prompt:
Nobody can disagree that Earth is our home. It gives us food, beauty of nature, possibilities to create. But as long as we live there, our planet has became more polluted place. Does this pollutions affect environmental problems? Must we pay attention to this problem?

In the modern world more people start to be concerned about environmental problem. But most of them overreact, making pollution problem looks not vital but dumb. And that is a huge problem. It cause politicians do not look at the main point - health of our home - Earth. People who cares about environmental health significantly overreacting and that makes problem look unimportant.

But climate changes is not just fantasies of crazy eco-activists. We can clearly feel it by observing snow in Moscow in the last month of spring. Trash island and tornados should make people think and speak about pollution problem. But in more polite way. Environmental health is important and we must talk about it.

Collecting all thoughts, only people responsible for pollutions and environmental health problems. We need to talk about it and make decisions in the way of making Earth more clear. But we must do it politely, with a look straight to the future.

messages.content:
You are an expert CEFR writing assessor.
Assess the student text using the provided task/context blocks as supporting evidence.
Use EXPERT_ANNOTATION, CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, and RANKING_ANCHORS only as supporting context; never override direct evidence from the student text.
Return ONLY one CEFR label from: A2|B1|B2.
Do not output JSON.
Do not output explanation.

STUDENT_TEXT: i have a dog. he name is Bob. i very like play with him. table sky because run yesterday.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Explain two advantages of the internet for students.
STUDENT_TEXT: On the one hand, internet is good. We can decide many problems online. Im happy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Describe a plan that changed and explain the final outcome.
STUDENT_TEXT: Ideally, we should have go to the park, but it was raining. Nevertheless, the atmosphere was overload with joy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
TEXTINSPECTOR_LEVEL: B1+

TASK: Give practical time-management advice to classmates.
STUDENT_TEXT: You should organise your week. Write down all deadlines and allocate time for tasks per day. To sum up, set priorities and keep in mind that everyone got same time. It appears that procrastination undermines productivity.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
FLESCH_KINCAID: 10.4

TASK: Discuss whether authorities underestimate a social crisis.
STUDENT_TEXT: It appears that the government tends to underestimate the severity of the crisis. Seldom have we seen such negligence. This may indicate a systemic failure.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Write a persuasive formal paragraph on environmental responsibility.
STUDENT_TEXT: We must not ignore the environmental issues lest we face irreversible consequences. Is it not our duty to preserve the planet? We observe a stark contrast: technological triumph vs moral decay.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Some people believe that too much attention has been paid recently to environmental problems. How much do you agree? Write a 4-paragraph essay.
STUDENT_TEXT: Nobody can disagree that Earth is our home. It gives us food, beauty of nature, possibilities to create. But as long as we live there, our planet has became more polluted place. Does this pollutions affect environmental problems? Must we pay attention to this problem?

In the modern world more people start to be concerned about environmental problem. But most of them overreact, making pollution problem looks not vital but dumb. And that is a huge problem. It cause politicians do not look at the main point - health of our home - Earth. People who cares about environmental health significantly overreacting and that makes problem look unimportant.

But climate changes is not just fantasies of crazy eco-activists. We can clearly feel it by observing snow in Moscow in the last month of spring. Trash island and tornados should make people think and speak about pollution problem. But in more polite way. Environmental health is important and we must talk about it.

Collecting all thoughts, only people responsible for pollutions and environmental health problems. We need to talk about it and make decisions in the way of making Earth more clear. But we must do it politely, with a look straight to the future.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
